message:
fix(core): harden probabilistic data structures and gc against edge cases

xor_filter.rs:
- Add bounds check in XorFilter8::contains() and XorFilter16::contains()
  to guard against out-of-bounds access when fingerprints vec is shorter
  than expected 3*block_length (possible via corrupted deserialization)

count_min_sketch.rs:
- Clamp epsilon/delta to (0,1) in CmsConfig::from_error_params() to
  prevent inf/NaN from invalid inputs that would panic on usize cast

hyperloglog.rs:
- Guard linear counting result against NaN/negative from floating-point
  edge cases; fall back to raw_estimate when lc is not finite

gc.rs:
- Log tracing::warn when SQLite reports negative page counts (possible
  database corruption) instead of silently returning 0.0

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
